author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

 Star Atlas x Jupiter Partnership Announcement  

We're thrilled to announce that we've partnered with Jupiter Aggregator to deliver an improved and user-friendly web3 experience. Jupiter Aggregator is the leading swap and aggregator service on the Solana blockchain, and this partnership will bring users the best deals anywhere, powered by the best aggregator and infrastructure in DeFi.

The new feature provides Star Atlas players with an enhanced gaming experience, directly from the Star Atlas Galactic Marketplace. It enables users to quickly exchange almost any token in their wallet at optimal rates and get right back to playing Star Atlas.

In response to the partnership, our CEO and co-founder Michael Wagner said, "This is a win-win for both communities and for the developers. We can't wait to see the impact it will have on the Star Atlas community and its Galactic Marketplace experience."

Learn more below!  

 | https://staratlasgame.medium.com/star-atlas-jupiter-aggregator-solana-partnership-feature-3200388657c1
 | https://support.staratlas.com/how-does-a-star-atlas-player-benefit-by-using-a-jupiter-aggregator
